title: DAV TRANSPORTATION NETWORK PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER - 211info
text: DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DAV TRANSPORTATION NETWORK PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transportation to and from the Portland VA Medical Center. Does not provide wheelchair-accessible transportation or door-to-door service. 100 SW Main Street Room 212a Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Veterans who have a verifiable appointment at Portland VA Medical Center. Hours: Varies (503) 721-7804 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-7804 Portland DAV Main phone (541) 440-1293 Roseburg DAV Main phone (541) 826-2111 ext 3619 Southern Oregon DAV Main phone (541) 383-2793 Bend (local inquiries only) INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make a reservation. Reservations must be scheduled at least four business days in advance. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties, and Cities of Albany, Astoria, Bend, Eugene, Florence, Longview, Salem, The Dalles, Tillamook, and Yamhill TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 12 Sandy Boulevard Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans Volunteer Opportunities * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - DAV DRIVERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON
